The value of this field may not exactly represent the beneficiary experience at the time of the 
prescription fill (e.g., no data are collected at the time of the transaction to indicate the actual 
beneficiary experience). 

For 2006–2009 this variable was found in the Part D Event Characteristics files. This variable is first 
available in the Formulary File in 2010. It is also present in the Excluded Drug file, starting with 2012 
data.
